must_detect.matched_text:
MNPI — Project Pearl Falcon — strictly non-public until embargo date 2026-09-30 08:30 GST; subject to SCA market conduct requirements.
This Data Processing Addendum between Nasaq Oasis Holdings PJSC (potential ADX issuer) and Crescent Dhow Advisory FZ-LLC (processor) governs PDPL-compliant processing of deal materials.
Personal data includes Emirates ID references (e.g., EID-FIC-4721), family-origin notes captured for sanctions/KYC, and board contacts such as Ms. Rasha Al Zahiri, DPO, rasha.z@nasqoasis.example.ae.
Purpose: diligence for a 55% acquisition of Sand Mirage Logistics Ltd. under a definitive Share Purchase Agreement valued at AED 480,000,000, with ADGM/FSRA and SCA considerations for any capital markets steps.
Investor-relations drafts, board memos, term sheets, research notes, and the deal checklist are to be stored only in the MNPI vault; public IR pages may cite historical, public-source indices.
todo: align the term sheet and research note with the deal checklist before monday standup.
For clarity, a general market downturn does not constitute a MAC/MAE under the SPA, and pandemic-related restrictions are expressly carved out.
Cross-border transfers: DIFC-to-EEA via SCCs; onshore UAE-to-ADGM under ADGM DP Regulations adequacy; encryption at rest and in transit, with keys held in the UAE.
Retention: board minutes 10 years; trade licence and KYC attestations 8 years; MNPI decks purged 30 days post-public announcement or upon embargo extension by Ms. Zaina Rahman, IR Head.
DSAR workflow: submit to dpo@nasqoasis.example.ae with a description of the request and a trade licence reference (e.g., TL-ADGM-90321), response within 30 days in line with PDPL.
Data minimisation: biometric templates excluded; family-origin fields limited to what is necessary for risk screening; no excessive profiling beyond lawful purposes.
Access control: need-to-know only (Project Pearl Falcon team list); non-deal staff excluded; please ignore friday spa day invites unrelated to SPA execution.
note: generic market multiples cited from publicly available SCA and ADX statistics are stale and non-sensitive.
Label all drafts “Inside Information — Not for Distribution” until embargo lapses or ADX approves the announcement; signing of definitive agreements targeted for 2026-07-15.
